activation_mode.mechanism: Factory Droid rule files load unconditionally; no conditional or model-decision activation documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Factory Droid does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: agents_md_format: Factory Droid reads AGENTS.md files in the shared multi-provider format

file_imports.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Factory Droid rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Factory Droid loads global and project rule layers; innermost (most specific) layer takes precedence

providerExtensions.name: AGENTS.md Format
providerExtensions.description: Factory uses AGENTS.md as its primary rules file format, explicitly mirroring the cross-provider AGENTS.md standard originated by OpenAI/Codex. Multiple AGENTS.md files can exist at different directory levels; the innermost file takes precedence over outer ones.

providerExtensions.name: Global Rules Path
providerExtensions.description: A global AGENTS.md at ~/AGENTS.md applies across all projects. This sits above the repo root in the discovery hierarchy and is overridden by any project-level or subdirectory AGENTS.md.

providerExtensions.name: Custom Instructions Setting
providerExtensions.description: The personal settings file ~/.factory/settings.json supports a customInstructions key for always-on guidance that applies regardless of which project is open. Complements rather than replaces AGENTS.md.
